phases.description: reviewing your CRM export, contact list, or outreach dataset to understand structure, issues, and business purpose.
phases.title: Data Intake

phases.description: format checks, syntax validation, duplicate flagging, and missing field identification.
phases.title: Automated Layer

phases.description: manual review of contact status, job title, company association, and role relevance for critical records.
phases.title: Human Verification Layer

phases.description: clean records, invalid records, duplicates, missing fields, and recommended next actions.
phases.title: Validation Report

phases.description: structured, CRM-ready file in your required format.
phases.title: Clean Data Delivery

services.description: Syntax check, domain validity, MX record confirmation, and deliverability indicators — reducing bounce rates and protecting sender reputation.
services.title: Email Address Verification

services.description: Format, country code, carrier data, and active-line indicators — eliminating wasted calling time on disconnected or reassigned numbers.
services.title: Phone Number Validation

services.description: Confirming company name, website domain, location, and business details are accurate and current.
services.title: Company and Domain Verification

services.description: Verifying whether contacts still hold their listed role and whether buying committee relevance is accurate.
services.title: Job Title and Role Confirmation

services.description: Identifying duplicates across contacts, accounts, emails, and domains — creating a cleaner CRM view and reducing repeated outreach.
services.title: Duplicate Detection and Merge

services.description: Flagging contacts who have left the company, changed roles, or should no longer be in active outreach lists.
services.title: Departed Contact Removal

validationSpotlight.description: Gartner estimates poor data quality costs organisations $12.9M per year. In B2B sales: SDRs waste 25–30% of their time on wrong contacts and outdated information, email campaigns generate high bounce rates that damage domain sender score over time, attribution models produce inaccurate ROI data, and CRM forecasting cannot be trusted. Data validation restores confidence — and with it, the commercial effectiveness of every outreach motion your team runs.

validationCta.description: Do not prospect with broken data. Before launching another campaign, make sure the list is worth using.
validationCta.title: Ready for Clean Data?
